name: Enterprise Zone Business Startup Waiver

eligibility.description: Requires a reasonable expectation at the start of the period that the business will meet zone requirements and bona fide efforts to comply.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a waiver of certain business requirement tests during a 'startup period' (up to 5 years) to maintain tax-exempt bond status.
